name: landing-profile-cinematic
description: Click the Cinematic profile pill in the LandingScreen, screenshot the resulting state. The pill should highlight, the Custom pill should remain dim, and FX modules (edge-flow, selection-halo, hover-lift, post-process, node-pulse, connection-sweep, label-bloom) should switch to checked.

setup.vlmDescription: LandingScreen modal with the 'Cinematic' profile pill highlighted (active state — typically a colored border / background). All other pills (Minimal, Standard, Workshop, Custom) should appear dim / unselected. The module list should show FX-group rows (edge-flow, selection-halo, hover-lift, post-process, node-pulse, connection-sweep, label-bloom) with checked checkboxes; render.penumbra-backdrop should also be checked. The summary text near the footer should read approximately '21 / 37 modules enabled' (or similar count higher than the Standard default).
